scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter @aboutty/core build && pnpm --filter @aboutty/cli build && pnpm --filter aboutty-action build && pnpm --filter @aboutty/deploy-irys build && pnpm --filter @aboutty/update-readme-aboutty build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @aboutty/core typecheck && pnpm --filter @aboutty/cli typecheck && pnpm --filter aboutty-action typecheck && pnpm --filter @aboutty/deploy-irys typecheck && pnpm --filter @aboutty/update-readme-aboutty typecheck && pnpm --filter @aboutty/studio typecheck
